wordingOfConditions:
(a) To be printed on the laВӯbel: The mixing ratio. вҖңHair colourants can cause severe allergic reacВӯtions. Read and follow instrucВӯtions. This product is not inВӯtended for use on persons under the age of 16. Temporary вҖҳblack hennaвҖҷ tattoos may increase your risk of allergy. Do not colour your hair if: вҖ” you have a rash on your face or sensitive, irriВӯtated and damaged scalp, вҖ” you have ever experiВӯenced any reaction after colouring your hair, вҖ” you have experienced a  reaction to a temporВӯary вҖҳblack hennaвҖҷ tattoo in the past.вҖқ 
(c) As from 3 March 2018, to be printed on the laВӯbel: The mixing ratio. вҖңThis product can cause severe allergic reactions. Read and follow instrucВӯtions. This  product is not inВӯtended for use on persons under the age of 16. TemВӯporary вҖҳblack hennaвҖҷ tattoos may increase the risk of alВӯlergy. Eyelashes shall not be coВӯloured if the consumer: вҖ” has a rash on the face or sensitive, irritated and damaged scalp, вҖ” has experienced any reВӯaction after colouring hair or eyelashes, вҖ” has experienced a reacВӯtion to a temporary вҖҳblack hennaвҖҷ tattoo in the past. For professional use only. Rinse eyes immediately if product comes into contact with themвҖқ
